prompt:
PROOF RUN for the Mochaccino consolidation refactor (DoD §5 of backlog/2026-06-09-mochaccino-consolidation-requirement.md). Goal: re-render the cortex designs through the NEWLY-REFACTORED pipeline and prove they come back as proportionate HTML-with-sparing-shape — NOT the all-SVG over-rotation that the previous version produced.

READ FIRST, in order: (1) ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins/appydave/skills/shelly/SKILL.md — especially the new 'Graphics-Warrant Gate (decide shape-or-not FIRST)'; (2) ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins/appydave/skills/mochaccino/SKILL.md — the new 'Comprehend → visualise' 4th mode + the shape-brief gate; (3) docs/david-design-patterns.md — the CORRECTION section (treat as GUIDANCE, NOT a mandate; HTML is the default; ~half love-tier exemplars use no diagram); (4) .claude/skills/comprehend-visualise/SKILL.md (the thin caller — context only).

You are running MOCHACCINO in comprehend → visualise mode over the EXISTING cortex workspace at .mochaccino/ (served :7422 — regenerate files, do NOT start a new port; curl to verify). The comprehension DATA already exists (.mochaccino/data/{06-brain-anatomy,02-brain-remembers,03-four-memories,04-brain-sleeps}.json, provenance cortex @ a129a5d). Do NOT re-comprehend; this run tests the RENDER decision.

FOR EACH of the 4 designs, run Shelly's graphics-warrant gate FIRST and decide shape-or-not:
  - DEFAULT is a clean semantic HTML layout. A drawn diagram/SVG is warranted ONLY where the content is genuinely a flow/topology/relationship AND a diagram clarifies — sparingly, situated. NEVER convert a working HTML layout wholesale to SVG. NEVER optimise for svg count.
  - Expectation to sanity-check your own judgment against (not a script): 03-four-memories is a TAXONOMY (four kinds), not a flow → should be HTML, no diagram. 04-brain-sleeps is a cycle and 02-brain-remembers is a flow → a SMALL sparing diagram MAY be warranted, but the body is HTML. 06-brain-anatomy: mostly HTML; at most ONE small diagram for the organ-swap relationship if it truly clarifies. If your instinct is 'draw everything as SVG again', STOP — that is the exact failure this refactor fixes.
  - Carry the form-agnostic rules: disciplined semantic block colour; ghost text where apt; KILL orange/amber on brown/beige; ease density; light-mode primary; AppyDave brand.
  - Keep MVC: index.html fetches data/NN-*.json. Keep provenance meta.source. Regenerate the gallery (cortex cluster grouped, 06 first; keep 01 + 05).

Report (ONE block): for EACH design — shape-or-not DECISION + one-line WHY + final form (e.g. 'HTML, no diagram' / 'HTML + one small cycle diagram'). Then the gallery URL. Then complete run-next-workflow bookkeeping IN FULL — run record + move to done/ + reports/ handback. DO NOT skip the reports/ handback (it has been skipped 3 times; it is being watched).
